version_description: Easy to play with capo in 3rd freet. Into The Nigth - Benny Mardones - 1980. Chords based on this version: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-9URZgAqeqo.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Tab: Guillermo Rosales A.

Capo 3rd Freet

Chords used:
Am=    002210
Em=    022000
Fmaj7= 132211
Dm=    000231
G=     320022
Am/G=  302210
F=     133211
Dm7/A= x00211

[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]

[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab] N.C.      [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
She's just sixteen years old[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Leave her alone, they say[/tab]
[tab]N.C. [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
Sepa-rated by fools[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Who don't know what love is yet[/tab]

But I want you to know

[Hook]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am/G[/ch]
If I could fly, I'd pick you up[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
I'd take you into the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am/G[/ch]
And show you a love[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Like you've never seen, ever seen[/tab]

[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab]N.C.       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
It's like having a dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Where nobody has a heart[/tab]
[tab]N.C.      [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
It's like having it all[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
And watching it fall apart[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
And I would wait till the end of time for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
And do it again, it's true[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
I can't measure my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
There's nothing to compare it to[/tab]

But I want you to know

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am/G[/ch]
If I could fly, I'd pick you up[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
I'd take you into the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am/G[/ch]
And show you a love[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am/G[/ch]
Oh, if I could fly, I'd pick you up[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
I'd take you into the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am/G[/ch]
And show you a love[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
Like you've never seen, ever seen, Yeah, ooh[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am/G[/ch]
If I could fly, I'd pick you up[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
I'd take you into the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am/G[/ch]
And show you a love[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am/G[/ch]
Oh, if I could fly, I'd pick you up[/tab]

[Outro] 
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am/G[/ch]
 And take you into the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am/G[/ch]
(Into the night, fly) if I could fly[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am/G[/ch]
I'd pick you up, Oh into the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am/G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am/G[/ch]
I'd pick you up, Oh into the night     [Fade...][/tab]
